sources.name: index.ts
sources.content:
export * from "./native-accordion.style"
export * as NativeAccordion from "./namespace"
export type {
  NativeAccordionButtonProps,
  NativeAccordionIconProps,
  NativeAccordionItemProps,
  NativeAccordionPanelProps,
  NativeAccordionRootProps,
} from "./native-accordion"
export {
  NativeAccordionButton,
  NativeAccordionIcon,
  NativeAccordionItem,
  NativeAccordionPanel,
  NativeAccordionPropsContext,
  NativeAccordionRoot,
  useNativeAccordionPropsContext,
} from "./native-accordion"
export * from "./use-native-accordion"

sources.name: namespace.ts
sources.content:
export {
  NativeAccordionButton as Button,
  NativeAccordionIcon as Icon,
  NativeAccordionItem as Item,
  NativeAccordionPanel as Panel,
  NativeAccordionPropsContext as PropsContext,
  NativeAccordionRoot as Root,
  useNativeAccordionPropsContext as usePropsContext,
} from "./native-accordion"
export type {
  NativeAccordionButtonProps as ButtonProps,
  NativeAccordionIconProps as IconProps,
  NativeAccordionItemProps as ItemProps,
  NativeAccordionPanelProps as PanelProps,
  NativeAccordionRootProps as RootProps,
} from "./native-accordion"
